test.details: 137 tests across 6 test files, all passing

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to the Testing section: document that @testing-library/react, @testing-library/user-event, and happy-dom are available as dev dependencies for client component testing. Note the `/** @vitest-environment happy-dom */` directive requirement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-extension-job-checker-tests installed these libraries. Future workers writing client component tests won't know they're available without documentation. The AGENTS.md Testing section currently only mentions 'Follow existing vitest patterns in shared/job-matching.test.ts'. (Carried forward from round 1.)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to the 'API route pattern' or 'Error responses' section: document the error handling pattern for Convex errors in API routes. Specifically: (1) use instanceof ConvexError for type discrimination, (2) also check error.data content to distinguish business errors from server errors, (3) document the matchedJobId retry fallback pattern in mark-applied. Note: the coupling between Convex error message strings (convex/jobs.ts) and the route's substring matching means if Convex messages change, the route's error classification silently breaks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-mark-route-error-handling introduced over-broad error matching because the pattern wasn't documented. The fix feature (fix-error-classification-too-broad) narrowed it but the pattern relies on exact substring matching of Convex error messages. convex/jobs.ts:191-192 throws 'stable job ID or an exact company, title, and location'; route.ts:40-41 matches these substrings. (Carried forward from round 1 with additional evidence from round 2 review.)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in backend-worker skill that the TDD red-green cycle doesn't apply to test-only features (where the task is purely to add tests for existing code). Test-only features should skip the 'red' phase.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-extension-job-checker-tests worker noted in skillFeedback that the TDD requirement was inapplicable for a test-only task. (Carried forward from round 1.)

rejectedObservations.observation: The coupling between Convex error message strings and the route's substring matching is not documented anywhere.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — .factory/library/testing.md already documents the Convex error classification pattern with the content-check requirement. The additional coupling risk is minimal because AGENTS.md prohibits modifying convex/jobs.ts, and the suggested AGENTS.md update (carried forward) covers the documentation gap.
